resources.string: No gacha tickets available! You earn 1 ticket every hour.
Importing an image creates a new project and clears current work. Continue?
Creating a new project clears current work. Continue?
This image can be split into multiple frames.
Choose a layout to split this sheet into animation frames.
Pinch to zoom, drag to move
Merge all layers into the main canvas?
This color is already in the palette
This operation will flatten all objects from all layers into images. Vector objects (shapes, texts, drawings) will be converted to pixels and can no longer be edited individually. Continue?
Do you really want to create a new canvas? All current content will be lost.
You have %d objects on the canvas. For better performance, it is recommended to flatten the drawings.
Lower = more pixels considered white and made transparent
Object picked up - click Move to place it
Pixel mode requires: locked layer, max zoom (1000%), and grid enabled
Choose where to store your canvas images and data. External storage allows saving to SD card if available.
Warning: Changing location does not migrate existing projects. They will remain in the old location.
For the change to take effect, the editor must be restarted. Restart now?
This folder is not directly writable. Try another location.
Data is always saved internally. External backup allows recovering your projects if the device is lost.
Copy all data to the external backup folder?
This folder already contains project data. Would you like to load it?
No backup data found in this folder
Do you want to abandon the current game?
A game is in progress. Do you want to resume?
Do you want to abandon the current game?
A saved game was found. Do you want to continue?
The current game will be lost. Continue?

Congratulations! You beat the AI.

Rewards:
• %1$d gacha tickets
• Boost x%2$d for %3$d minutes
Tap the circles as fast as possible!
Choose a mode and press Play
Merge tiles to reach the goal!
The current game will be lost. Continue?
Survive enemy waves with weapons and upgrades
Drop and merge marbles to reach 1024
A saved game was found. Do you want to continue?
The current game will be lost. Continue?

Congratulations! You beat the AI.

Rewards:
• %1$d gacha tickets
• Boost x%2$d for %3$d minutes
Mandatory capture! You must take an enemy piece.
What do you want to reset?
Select the items to reset. This action cannot be undone.
Unable to refresh prices at the moment.
Images from the folder will be shuffled and displayed one by one.
Prevents the screen from going to sleep while the crypto module is displayed.
No images found in this folder.
Displays the Android banner with time, date and notifications.
Displays the bottom bar with the back button and shortcuts.
Frequency of API calls to refresh crypto prices.
Displays a view of the Earth calculated in real time based on astronomical positions.
Hides the Moon and orbit, and zooms in on the Earth to fill the widget.
Disable to use the cloud-free texture (earth_clear.jpg) built into the app.
Adds a slight bluish glow to the terminator (boundary between day and night sides).
The "Fixed view 📌" always centers the Earth on this location, with the day/night terminator calculated in real time.

This view uses real photos of Earth taken by the DSCOVR satellite, positioned at the L1 Lagrange point - 1.5 million km between Earth and the Sun. From there, it permanently observes the sunlit side of Earth. Images are published by NASA every 1-2 hours and updated automatically.
Choose which shortcuts are displayed in the module banner.
Articles containing these words will be hidden automatically.
This will permanently delete the file from your device.
Enable to reposition the reference image
Rotate tiles to connect all the pipes
Connect all stars with non-crossing bridges
Tap a star to start a bridge.
Tap an aligned star to place the bridge.
Casino blackjack with up to 4 AI opponents
You have no neutrinos left to bet. Earn more by playing the clicker!
Find all matching pairs of cards
Drag to move • Auto-fire\nTap to start
the equivalent of an average human cell
the mass of a grain of sand (~1 mm)
the number of atoms in a 0.05 mL water drop
the equivalent of an iron paperclip (~1 g)
the atomic mass of a coin (~7.5 g)
the atomic mass of an apple (~100 g)
as many as a modern smartphone (~180 g)
the equivalent of one litre of water
as many as a compact car (~1.3 t)
the atomic mass of the Great Pyramid of Giza
as many as all of Earth\'s oceans
equals the atomic mass of planet Earth
comparable to the entire Milky Way
as many as the Local Group of galaxies
reach the estimated total atoms of the observable universe
Connect the dots, fill the grid
Draw a path from S to F that visits every cell.
Connect each color pair without crossing paths.
Could not generate a grid. Try again.
Drag to move • Auto-fire\n\nTap to start
Connect cells to reach zero — or ten!
New %1$s level. Connect %2$d cells to adjust values!
Perfect mode — %1$s. Find the %2$d exact moves.
%1$d normal and %2$d plus cells left to adjust.
Invalid pattern for this link length.
Surf the procedural hills — tap to dive and build speed!
Slot machine – line up suits and colors to win neutrinos
Explore procedural dungeons and survive 5 floors
+5% chance to deal critical damage (x1.5 base)
Shield reflects 15% of absorbed damage to nearby enemies
+12% chance for a killed enemy to explode
Unlock: fire a laser at the nearest enemy
Unlock: aura that slows and damages nearby enemies
Unlock: projectile that bounces between enemies
Unlock: throw a bomb that explodes on impact
Unlock: orbs that orbit around you and damage enemies
Unlock: lightning that chains between multiple enemies
Fire one additional projectile per shot
Laser ignites enemies: +20% burn DoT damage over 2s
Explosions leave a toxic zone for 2s, ticking 1/5 of bomb damage every 0.5s
+10% chance per level to fork the lightning at each enemy (max 50%)
Each orb fires one additional projectile
Orbital projectiles split into 2 on impact
Orbital projectiles apply a poison DoT
Fires projectiles at the nearest enemy
Fires a laser beam, can burn enemies
Damages and slows all nearby enemies
Throws bombs that explode on impact
Orbs orbiting you that shoot at enemies
